## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Dgraph and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and SEO efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/rynovW7L4zcmQCYFAqqc1iU_hrsXixqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel compiled a large backlog of \~480 potential keywords/topics related to graph databases, graph theory, knowledge graphs etc. with a total search volume of \~407K.](https://fathom.video/share/rynovW7L4zcmQCYFAqqc1iU_hrsXixqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [Discussed the insight that 60% of Google searches are for queries that have never been searched before, highlighting the importance of targeting long-tail/niche topics.](https://fathom.video/share/rynovW7L4zcmQCYFAqqc1iU_hrsXixqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
  - [Identified potential areas to explore like AI APIs, courses/learning resources for AI development and implementation for developers.](https://fathom.video/share/rynovW7L4zcmQCYFAqqc1iU_hrsXixqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
  - [For Hyper Mode, the plan is to create high-quality pillar content pieces with surrounding cluster content all linking back to it.](https://fathom.video/share/rynovW7L4zcmQCYFAqqc1iU_hrsXixqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)

## Topics

### Keyword Research Backlog

  - [Marcel compiled a backlog of 479 potential assignments/topics related to graphs, graph theory, knowledge graphs etc.](https://fathom.video/share/rynovW7L4zcmQCYFAqqc1iU_hrsXixqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [The backlog has a total search volume of \~407K based on the primary keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/rynovW7L4zcmQCYFAqqc1iU_hrsXixqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [It includes competitors, related terminology, concepts from research papers etc.](https://fathom.video/share/rynovW7L4zcmQCYFAqqc1iU_hrsXixqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
  - [Some low search volume terms were included as they may still be relevant topics to cover.](https://fathom.video/share/rynovW7L4zcmQCYFAqqc1iU_hrsXixqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)

### Targeting Unsearched Queries

  - [60% of Google searches are for queries that have never been searched before.](https://fathom.video/share/rynovW7L4zcmQCYFAqqc1iU_hrsXixqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
  - [This insight highlights the potential of targeting long-tail, niche topics beyond just high search volume keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/rynovW7L4zcmQCYFAqqc1iU_hrsXixqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Zero-traffic keywords present an opportunity as the content can capture that initial demand.](https://fathom.video/share/rynovW7L4zcmQCYFAqqc1iU_hrsXixqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=918.0)

### Exploring AI APIs and Learning Resources

  - [Potential area to explore is around AI APIs, hosting open source models etc.](https://fathom.video/share/rynovW7L4zcmQCYFAqqc1iU_hrsXixqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
  - [There may be demand from developers looking to implement AI features/models in their apps.](https://fathom.video/share/rynovW7L4zcmQCYFAqqc1iU_hrsXixqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
  - [Learning resources like courses, job roles, skills needed to become an AI engineer could also be promising areas.](https://fathom.video/share/rynovW7L4zcmQCYFAqqc1iU_hrsXixqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)

### Content Strategy for Hyper Mode

  - [For Hyper Mode, create high-quality pillar content pieces as the core.](https://fathom.video/share/rynovW7L4zcmQCYFAqqc1iU_hrsXixqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Surround each pillar piece with 10-20 supporting cluster content pieces that all link back to the pillar.](https://fathom.video/share/rynovW7L4zcmQCYFAqqc1iU_hrsXixqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1823.0)
  - [This forces the Hyper Mode team to establish their unique perspective/positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/rynovW7L4zcmQCYFAqqc1iU_hrsXixqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1847.0)
  - [While this curated approach is taken for Hyper Mode, continue executing the existing content strategy for Dgraph.](https://fathom.video/share/rynovW7L4zcmQCYFAqqc1iU_hrsXixqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1861.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Research keywords/topics around AI APIs, hosting models, AI engineering roles/skills](https://fathom.video/share/rynovW7L4zcmQCYFAqqc1iU_hrsXixqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
  - [Identify potential pillar topics for high-quality focus pieces for Hyper Mode](https://fathom.video/share/rynovW7L4zcmQCYFAqqc1iU_hrsXixqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Discuss rationale behind not pursuing the virtual workshop idea for Hyper Mode](https://fathom.video/share/rynovW7L4zcmQCYFAqqc1iU_hrsXixqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1623.0)
  - [Finalize backlog and prioritize keywords to target for Dgraph's content](https://fathom.video/share/rynovW7L4zcmQCYFAqqc1iU_hrsXixqZ?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
